parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.n8n_historico_mensagens (session_id, tenant_id, message)
VALUES (
  'system_healthcheck_silent',
  'admin-system',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'type', 'tool',
    'name', 'healthcheck_silent',
    'content', jsonb_build_object(
      'workflow_id',    $1::text,
      'workflow_name',  $2::text,
      'reason',         $3::text,
      'hours_ago',      $4::text,
      'exec_id',        $5::text,
      'status',         $6::text,
      'checked_at',     $7::text
    ),
    'tool_call_id', 'hc_' || $8::text
  )
);
